Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Counsel For Plaintiff In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Mar-04-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'S Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation is Granted. No opposition filed.

The Court signed the proposed order and the proposed judgment submitted by plaintiff's counsel by email.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
